title: Smoky Scotch Bonnet Chicken Shawarma
description: A flavorful and spicy Middle Eastern-inspired shawarma dish featuring smoky scotch bonnet peppers and savory chicken.

ingredients.name: smoky scotch bonnet peppers
ingredients.notes: depending on desired level of heat

ingredients.name: middle eastern spices
ingredients.notes: such as cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and middle eastern spices.
2. Add the chicken strips to the marinade and mix well to coat.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
4. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
5. Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
6. Meanwhile, toast the fattoush salad mix in a dry skillet over medium heat until crispy.
7. Slice the cooked chicken into thin strips.
8. Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for a few minutes.
9. Assemble the shawarma by spreading the toasted fattoush salad mix on the pita bread, followed by the sliced chicken and a few slices of smoky scotch bonnet pepper.
